chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.41 of 2022 Muhammad Kamran & others Versus Province of Sindh & aothers Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 2513/22 2. For orders on CMA 244/22 3. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 4, For orders on CMA 245/22 5. For hearing of main case. 6. For orders on CMA 246/22 Dated: 04.03.2024 None present for the appellants. Mr. Abdul Jaleel Zubedi, Assistant Advocate General. -.-.- Learned Single Judge was pleased to dismiss the injunction application of the appellants vide impugned order against which this appeal was filed. Since last two dates counsel for the appellants did not appear whereas previous to the last two dates one Mr. Jawed Panhwar Advocate held brief for appellants’ counsel. Similarly on 24.08.2022 counsel for the appellants was called absent without any intimation. Today position is same. The history is not the one where any indulgence could be given to the appellants. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
